summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Remy payment/subscription MVP. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Payment flow with Mercado Pago integration is working correctly (TEST mode).
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: Mercado Pago card tokenization (mp.createCardToken) requires actual MP SDK integration - frontend correctly loads SDK dynamically and form is ready
MOCKED: Actual payment processing with Mercado Pago is using TEST credentials - card tokenization returns simulated tokens in test mode
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users for subscription testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment and subscription MVP is complete. All flows tested: Landing→Auth→Subscribe→Biblioteca. Mercado Pago integration works in TEST mode. Previous iteration_6 security bug (admin endpoints) should be retested if fixed.

plans_api.details: Returns monthly ($9,990) and semestral ($29,990) plans with features, discount info, and MercadoPago public key

subscription_status.details: Returns has_subscription=false for non-subscribers, protected by auth

landing_pricing_section.details: Displays both plans with correct prices, 50% discount badge on semestral plan

auth_redirect_parameter.details: Auth page respects redirect parameter, redirects to /subscribe?plan=monthly after login

subscribe_page_plan_selection.details: Shows plan cards, preselects from URL param, loads plans from API

subscribe_page_payment_form.details: All form fields present: card number, expiry, CVV, holder name, doc type/number

biblioteca_subscription_banner.details: Non-subscribers see banner with 'Desbloquea todo el contenido' and 'Suscribirme ahora' button

biblioteca_lock_icons.details: Non-subscribers see lock icon on course cards, 'Suscribirse para acceder' button

biblioteca_active_subscriber.details: Active subscribers see 'Suscripción activa - Acceso completo' badge, no banner, 'Comenzar' button, no locks
